description: Indulge in the joy of Easter with our special celebration discount on macarons. This ecommerce email template is perfect for announcing your flash sale, enticing customers with a special offer they can't resist. Our design, inspired by the Food and Beverage industry, is appealing to the eyes and tastebuds alike. It features a Dark Mode option, ensuring a comfortable and engaging shopping experience for your customers, day or night. This product is not only a sale announcement, but also a reflection of the festive Easter spirit. Make your Easter sale a memorable event with this unique template, and watch your ecommerce success multiply like Easter eggs.
short_description: Celebrate Easter with our special discount on macarons. This ecommerce email template announces your flash sale, enticing customers with an irresistible offer. Inspired by the Food and Beverage industry, it features a Dark Mode for a comfortable shopping experience. Make your Easter sale memorable with this festive template and boost your ecommerce success.

designer.description: UX/UI Designer with great creativity and artistic talent delivering high-impact design experiences, marketing solutions and digital projects. Exceptional collaborative and interpersonal skills; solid team player with well-developed written and verbal communication abilities. Highly skilled in deadline and project management, and working within budget requirements. Experience working for international companies (USA, Latin America, Europe). Looking for the best collaboration opportunities to materialize your ideas and help you grow your business!
